author: yhny1001
description: Memory compression for TauriTavern. Detects agent runtime via the agent-system extension-store flag (agentModeEnabled). Agent mode injects a conditional chunked retrieval protocol — snippet-first via chat_search, fall back to chat_read_messages with small max_chars (2-3k) ranges, never >= 8000. Explicitly clarifies that TT requires tool_choice on every round (workspace.* tools count); avoids the v0.1.6 drift_recovery trap. Chat mode keeps pre-grep + sentinel fallback.
